subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto our Lord, the All-Merciful, Who hath made the Qur'an a light for all the peoples of creation, and verily it is the grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لربنا الرحمن الذی جعل الفرقان نورا لاهل الامکان و انه لهی النعمه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
